final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce campaign, designed at 16:9 aspect ratio.

Style/medium: needs a visually rich, editorial promotional poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typographic stacking with product/hero subject physically overlapping and occluding portions of the background lettering
Subject: must include a product or hero subject as the focal element that partially covers the stacked type
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an energetic, attention-grabbing promotional atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, high-impact direction suited to cross-border e-commerce promotion — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include decorative art lettering (艺术字); must include font/type stacking layers; composition must feel complex and layered but visually organized — not chaotic; product or main subject must overlap and partially obscure some of the typographic elements
Avoid: flat or sparse layouts; cluttered illegible mess
